opportunity.summary: Ranks MyMaravia launch bets by combining the workbook's demand-intent/category rollups with the live SQLite eRank snapshot and MyMaravia Etsy API baseline.

opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Build one listing per profession with the same LED nameplate base, profession artwork, title/credential personalization, and clean office mockups.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Doctor, nurse, therapist, realtor, lawyer, teacher, principal, manager, salon owner LED nameplates
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 137 listings across 37 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Build one listing per profession with the same LED nameplate base, profession artwork, title/credential personalization, and clean office mockups.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Doctor, nurse, therapist, realtor, lawyer, teacher, principal, manager, salon owner LED nameplates
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 42 listings across 21 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Teacher and school-staff appreciation LED signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Turn teacher appreciation demand into desk identity gifts for teachers, principals, counselors, coaches, and school nurses.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Teacher LED nameplate, principal desk sign, counselor office sign, school nurse nameplate
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 70 listings across 27 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Primary Product Family: LED acrylic signs and event signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use wedding demand as an event-sign angle, but keep it MyMaravia-native: table signs, bridal-suite signs, and giftable name lights.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Bride LED sign, wedding table name sign, bridal suite desk light, bridesmaid gift sign
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 411 listings across 47 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Pet memorial and remembrance LED plaques
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use memorial demand carefully with tasteful pet/name/date artwork, warm glow, and gift-ready copy.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Pet memorial LED plaque, dog memorial desk light, remembrance name sign
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 123 listings across 23 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Property, address, and office-door identity signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use your sign workflow for practical identity products: address, suite, office, reception, and small-business door signs.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Custom office door sign, suite number sign, property name sign, house number acrylic sign
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 208 listings across 21 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Garage, workshop, and man-cave LED identity signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Translate gifts-for-him demand into personalized bench, garage, desk, and hobby-space identity signs.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Dad garage LED sign, mechanic desk sign, golf office sign, workshop nameplate
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 189 listings across 45 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Mom and grandma keepsake LED desk signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Large seasonal demand, but make it a focused keepsake sign test instead of chasing broad candle/jewelry gift traffic.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Mom LED keepsake sign, grandma desk light, birth-flower family name sign
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 258 listings across 39 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Pet memorial and remembrance LED plaques
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use memorial demand carefully with tasteful pet/name/date artwork, warm glow, and gift-ready copy.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Pet memorial LED plaque, dog memorial desk light, remembrance name sign
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 79 listings across 28 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Realtor closing gift desk signs and coaster bundles
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Create realtor-friendly gifts with buyer names, home year, brokerage desk use, and easy repeat-order/bulk positioning.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Realtor closing gift LED sign, new homeowner coasters, brokerage desk sign bundle
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 66 listings across 20 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Personalized family and novelty desk signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use broad gift demand as a testing lane only after profession and practical identity listings are covered.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: Family name LED sign, funny office desk sign, personalized desk gift
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 309 listings across 35 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Treat this as a small test until it proves buyer-intent fit with MyMaravia's current product family.
opportunityQueue.Suggested Listings: One focused LED nameplate variant with intent-specific mockups and title terms
opportunityQueue.Evidence Note: 134 listings across 34 shops in the workbook demand rollup.

opportunityQueue.Product Bet: Personalized family and novelty desk signs
opportunityQueue.Why It Matters: Use broad gift demand as a testing lane only after profession and practical identity listings are covered.
